problem id: b8e5057a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(2) AND SHR(3)) XOR NOT SHR(6)

examples:
  10111100 -> 11101111
  11111110 -> 11100111
  01101111 -> 11110011
  10110111 -> 11101011
  10011000 -> 11111111
  01001001 -> 11111111
  10110011 -> 11111011
  01101011 -> 11110011
  11010010 -> 11110110
  10100111 -> 11101001

query: 01100101
predicted answer: 11111010
